name: FEM | AVENGERS
description:
They are Earth's Mightiest Heroines, a family of legends, warriors, and pioneers united to face threats no single hero could withstand.

At their heart is Captain America – Evelyn Rogers – a living legend thawed from ice, carrying the ideals of a bygone era into a complex modern world. Her shield is a symbol of protection, and her leadership is the team's moral compass.

Iron Woman – Antonia "Toni" Stark – is the genius, billionaire, and technological marvel who built herself a heart and a suit of armor to protect the world she once endangered. Her wit is as sharp as her repulsors, and her resources are limitless.

Thor Odinsdottir, the Goddess of Thunder, brings the power of a god and the heart of a warrior. Wielder of Mjolnir and heir to the throne of Asgard, she fights for her adopted home with storm and steel.

She-Hulk – Jennifer Walters is the brilliant attorney who can bench-press a tank without wrinkling her suit. She balances immense gamma-powered strength with a razor-sharp legal mind, ensuring justice is served both in and out of the courtroom.

Black Widow – Natasha Romanoff is the spy whose past is a ghost she can never escape. A master of deception and combat, she is the team's eyes in the shadows and their unwavering, lethal protector.

Rounding out the team is Hawkeye – Kate Bishop, the next generation. She proves that with enough skill, courage, and a perfectly aimed arrow, a human can stand alongside gods and giants.

Together, they are more than a team. They are sisters-in-arms, a beacon of hope, and the first, last, and strongest line of defense for humanity. Whatever stands against them, they will face it together.
creator: STEVE007
